Name: delete_departments
SQL: WITH mutation_result AS (DELETE FROM "public"."departments" WHERE departments."name" = $1::text RETURNING *) SELECT json_build_object('affected_rows', (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM mutation_result), 'returning', (SELECT COALESCE(json_agg(row_to_json("_e")), '[]'::json) FROM (SELECT mutation_result."id" AS "id", mutation_result."name" AS "name", "mutation_result.r.employees"."employees" AS "employees" FROM mutation_result LEFT OUTER JOIN LATERAL (SELECT coalesce(json_agg("mutation_result.r.employees"), '[]') AS "employees" FROM (WITH "mutation_result.r.employees.base" AS (SELECT * FROM "public"."user_departments" WHERE "department_id" = "mutation_result"."id") SELECT row_to_json((SELECT "_e" FROM (SELECT "mutation_result.r.employees.base"."user_id" AS "user_id", "mutation_result.r.employees.base"."role" AS "role") AS "_e")) AS "mutation_result.r.employees" FROM "mutation_result.r.employees.base") AS "mutation_result.r.employees") AS "mutation_result.r.employees" ON ('true')) AS "_e"))
